name: withered-unit-595f
description: Build a personal website, blog, or portfolio with Astro.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run content:audit && npm test && npm run build && npm run cf:dry-run
scripts.ci:pr: npm run typecheck && npm run content:audit && npm run test:ci && npm run build && npm run cf:dry-run
scripts.test: find src -name '*.test.ts' -print | xargs env NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-loader ./scripts/ts-test-loader.mjs' node --test
scripts.test:ci: find src -name '*.test.ts' -print | sort | xargs env NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-loader ./scripts/ts-test-loader.mjs' node --test --test-reporter=spec
scripts.test:coverage: find src -name '*.test.ts' -print | sort | xargs env NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-loader ./scripts/ts-test-loader.mjs' node --test --experimental-test-coverage
